item.title: 回文划分 | Palindrome Partitioning
item.description:
发表于 1 月 15 日

回文划分

var partition = function (s) { // buffer for partition in DFS let partition = []; // final output of palindrome substrings let result = []; const isPalindrome = (str) => str === str.split("").reverse().join(""); const dfs = (s, partition) => { // Base case: // Empty string must be palindrome if (0 == s.length) { result.push([...partition]); return; } // General cases: for (let i = 0; i < s.length; i++) { let prefix = s.substring(0, i + 1); let postfix = s.substring(i + 1); // Current prefix is palindrome, keep trying to make more partition in postfix by DFS if (isPalindrome(prefix)) { dfs(postfix, [...partition, prefix]); } } return; }; dfs(s, partition); return result; }; console.log(partition("aab"));

穆罕默德·易卜拉欣 - 1 月 11 日

ZeeshanAli-0704

Palindrome Partitioning

var partition = function (s) { // buffer for partition in DFS let partition = []; // final output of palindrome substrings let result = []; const isPalindrome = (str) => str === str.split("").reverse().join(""); const dfs = (s, partition) => { // Base case: // Empty string must be palindrome if (0 == s.length) { result.push([...partition]); return; } // General cases: for (let i = 0; i < s.length; i++) { let prefix = s.substring(0, i + 1); let postfix = s.substring(i + 1); // Current prefix is palindrome, keep trying to make more partition in postfix by DFS if (isPalindrome(prefix)) { dfs(postfix, [...partition, prefix]); } } return; }; dfs(s, partition); return result;
};
console.log(partition("aab"));

item.title: LeetCode #20 JavaScript 中的有效括号 | LeetCode #20 Valid Parentheses with JavaScript
item.description:
福西正树

发表于 1 月 15 日

解决方案

/** * @param {string} s * @return {boolean} */ const isValid = function (s) { const map = { "(": ")", "[": "]", "{": "}", }; const stack = []; for (let i = 0; i < s.length; i++) { if (stack.length > 0 && map[stack[stack.length - 1]] === s[i]) { stack.pop(); } else { stack.push(s[i]); } } return stack.length === 0; };
  • 时间复杂度：O(n)
  • 空间复杂度：O(n)
  1. 使用键和值将目标括号保存在对象中
  2. 在 for 循环中将字符串添加到堆栈数组
  3. 如果右括号与堆栈数组中的最后一个值成对，则将其从堆栈数组中删除
  4. 如果堆栈数组最终为空则返回 true，如果剩余则返回 false

如果 masaki82 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

原文:

Masaki Fukunishi

Posted on Jan 15

Solution to LeetCode's 20. Valid Parentheses with JavaScript.

Solution 

/** * @param {string} s * @return {boolean} */
const isValid = function (s) { const map = { "(": ")", "[": "]", "{": "}", }; const stack = []; for (let i = 0; i < s.length; i++) { if (stack.length > 0 && map[stack[stack.length - 1]] === s[i]) { stack.pop(); } else { stack.push(s[i]); } } return stack.length === 0;
};
  • Time complexity: O(n)
  • Space complexity: O(n)
  1. save the target parentheses in an object with keys and values
  2. add the string to the stack array in a for loop
  3. if the closing parenthesis is a pair with the last value in the stack array, remove it from the stack array
  4. return true if the stack array is finally empty, false if it remains

item.title: 如何使用 Google Analytics 数据 API | How to use Google Analytics Data API
item.description:
在本文中，我将向您介绍如何使用Google Analytics Data API以最简单的方式从Google Analytics获取数据。 阅读本文后，您将能够在您的项目中轻松使用它。 因此，事不宜迟，让我们开始吧。

在我的投资组合中，我刚刚实施了Google Analytics Data API ，以便我可以显示过去 7 天内有多少人访问过该网站。 因为我的投资组合已经在使用谷歌分析来跟踪用户访问。 我只需要使用它的 API 来获取该数据。

但首先，看看它在我的投资组合中的表现：

要求

我们需要三个值来获取数据：

  • GA_PROPERTY_ID
  • GA_CLIENT_EMAIL
  • GA_PRIVATE_KEY

GA_PROPERTY_ID

首先，您需要获取要从中获取数据的 Google Analytics 项目的GA_PROPERTY_ID 。

为此，您需要执行以下步骤：

  • 访问谷歌分析。
  • 选择管理员。
  • 选择属性。
  • 选择属性设置。

如果媒体资源设置显示数字媒体资源PROPERTY ID ，例如“123...”，则这是您的 Google Analytics 4 媒体资源的数字 ID。

要获取GA_CLIENT_EMAIL和GA_PRIVATE_KEY ，您需要访问 Google Analytics Data API 的文档，然后单击启用 Google Analytics Data API v1按钮，如下图所示：

然后系统会提示您输入项目名称。 输入名称后点击下一步按钮

然后系统会提示您将凭证文件下载为 JSON。

下载该文件后。 您将在该 JSON 文件中找到private_key和client_email属性。 将这两个保存在您的.env.local中。

现在您拥有了所有必要的信息或密钥。

安装依赖

要获取数据，您需要安装@google-analytics/data包。 您只需在终端中运行以下命令即可做到这一点。

 yarn add @google-analytics/data # or npm i @google-analytics/data # or pnpm i @google-analytics/data

在项目中使用 Google Analytics 数据 API

由于我在我的投资组合中使用Next.js ，所以我将使用Next.js API 路由。 你可以用不同的框架做同样的事情。

我将创建一个 API 路由pages/api/ga.ts ：

 import { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from "next"; import { BetaAnalyticsDataClient } from "@google-analytics/data"; // 👇 Setting PropertyId const propertyId = process.env.GA_PROPERTY_ID; const analyticsDataClient = new BetaAnalyticsDataClient({ credentials: { client_email: process.env.GA_CLIENT_EMAIL, private_key: process.env.GA_PRIVATE_KEY?.replace(/\n/gm, "\n"), // replacing is necessary }, }); export default async function handler( _req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse ) { // 👇 Running a simple report const [response] = await analyticsDataClient.runReport({ property: `properties/${propertyId}`, dateRanges: [ { startDate: `7daysAgo`, //👈 eg "7daysAgo" or "30daysAgo" endDate: "today", }, ], dimensions: [ { name: "year", // data will be year wise }, ], metrics: [ { name: "activeUsers", // it returs the active users }, ], }); // Returning the respose. return res.status(200).json({ response, }); }

这就是获取数据所需的全部内容。 它将返回响应。 我的投资组合代码可以在GitHub 上找到，你可以查看我是如何使用它的。

您可以使用维度和指标来获取所需的数据。

包起来

在本文中，我解释了如何使用 Google Analytics Data API 从 Google Analytics 获取数据。 阅读本文后，您现在应该能够轻松地在您的项目中实现此 API。

如果您喜欢这篇文章，请不要忘记给❤️和书签🏷️供以后使用，如果您有任何问题或反馈，请不要犹豫，将它们放在下面的评论中。 我会在下一篇中看到。

与我联系

推特领英网站通讯支持

一旦暂停，j471n 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，j471n 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，j471n 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 j471n 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 j471n 的方法：

降低 j471n 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 j471n 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

In this article, I am going to walk you through that how you Google Analytics Data API to fetch data from Google Analytics in the simplest way I can. After reading this article you'll be able to use this in your project with ease. So without further due, Let's jump into it.

In my portfolio, I have just implemented Google Analytics Data API so that I can show how many people have visited this site in the last 7 days. As my Portfolio is already using Google Analytics to track user visits. I just need to use its API to fetch that data.

But first, look at how it's showing in my portfolio:

Requirements

We need three values to fetch the data:

  • GA_PROPERTY_ID
  • GA_CLIENT_EMAIL
  • GA_PRIVATE_KEY

GA_PROPERTY_ID

First, you need to get GA_PROPERTY_ID of the Google Analytics project from which you want to fetch the data.

To get this you need to follow these steps:

  • Visit Google Analytics.
  • Select Admin.
  • Select the Property.
  • Select Property Settings.

If the Property Settings shows a numeric PROPERTY ID such as "123...", this is the numeric Id of your Google Analytics 4 property.

GA_CLIENT_EMAIL and GA_PRIVATE_KEY

To get GA_CLIENT_EMAIL and GA_PRIVATE_KEY you need to visit Google Analytics Data API's documentation and then click on Enable the Google Analytics Data API v1 button as shown in the image below:

And then you will be prompted to enter the name of the project. After entering the name click on the Next button

Then you will be prompted to download the credential file as JSON.

After downloading that file. You will find private_key and client_email properties in that JSON file. Save these two in your .env.local.

Now you have all the necessary information or keys.

Installing Dependency

To fetch the data you need to install a @google-analytics/data package. You can do that by simply running the following command in the terminal.

yarn add @google-analytics/data
# or 
npm i @google-analytics/data
# or
pnpm i @google-analytics/data

Using Google Analytics Data API in Project

As I am using Next.js for my portfolio so I will use Next.js API Routes. You can do the same thing with different frameworks.

I will create an API route pages/api/ga.ts:

import { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from "next";
import { BetaAnalyticsDataClient } from "@google-analytics/data"; // 👇 Setting PropertyId
const propertyId = process.env.GA_PROPERTY_ID; const analyticsDataClient = new BetaAnalyticsDataClient({ credentials: { client_email: process.env.GA_CLIENT_EMAIL, private_key: process.env.GA_PRIVATE_KEY?.replace(/\n/gm, "\n"), // replacing is necessary },
}); export default async function handler( _req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse
) { // 👇 Running a simple report const [response] = await analyticsDataClient.runReport({ property: `properties/${propertyId}`, dateRanges: [ { startDate: `7daysAgo`, //👈 e.g. "7daysAgo" or "30daysAgo" endDate: "today", }, ], dimensions: [ { name: "year", // data will be year wise }, ], metrics: [ { name: "activeUsers", // it returs the active users }, ], }); // Returning the respose. return res.status(200).json({ response, });
}

This is all you need to fetch the data. and It will return the response. My portfolio code can be found on GitHub you can check out How I used it.

You can play with Dimensions and Metrics to get your desired data.

Wrapping up

In this article, I have explained how you can use the Google Analytics Data API to fetch data from Google Analytics. After reading this article, you should now be able to easily implement this API on your projects.

If you enjoyed this article, then don't forget to give ❤️ and Bookmark 🏷️for later use and if you have any questions or feedback then don't hesitate to drop them in the comments below. I'll see in the next one.

Connect with me

Twitter GitHub LinkedIn Instagram Website Newsletter Support

☝️ Check out this all-time classic DEV post

Alfredo Carreón Urbano - Jan 8

item.title: 流 | GIT Flow
item.description:
它由 nvie 的文森特·德里森 (Vincent Driessen) 首次出版并广受欢迎。 这为管理大型项目提供了一个强大的框架。 这适用于发布基于时间表的项目。

但对于那些喜欢和使用它的人来说，下面是一些可以帮助您了解这个工作流程的快捷方式。

为 git 客户端安装 git-flow 插件简单明了。 对于 mac-os，最容易安装的是brew install git-flow 。

基本命令和配置

  • 混帐合并

基本配置流程

并发配置流程

从main创建一个develop分支。

  • 当一个feature完成时，它会被合并到develop分支中。
  • 如果检测到main中的问题，则会从main创建一个hotfix分支。
  • 这些是与 git-flow 包装器客户端使用的一些 git 命令相对应的基本指南。 这些命令并非一成不变。 根据情况，在开发过程中可以更改或更改某些步骤。

    如果 repo 中不存在，请在本地创建一个开发分支。

    • 初始化（仅针对 git flow）
     $ git flow init Which branch should be used for bringing forth production releases? - develop - master Which branch should be used for integration of the "next release"? - master - develop Branch name for "next release" development: [develop] How to name your supporting branch prefixes? Feature branches? [feature/] Bugfix branches? [bugfix/] Release branches? [release/] Hotfix branches? [hotfix/] Support branches? [support/] Version tag prefix? [] Hooks and filters directory? [../../.git/hooks]
    • 创建功能分支
    git flow feature start <branch>

    对比

    git checkout develop # this switches the branch to the develop branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest git checkout -b feature/<branch> # this creates a branch named 'feature/<branch>' git push --set-upstream origin feature/<branch> # push changes to git repo to a new 'feature/<branch>'
     git flow feature finish <branch>

    对比

    git checkout feature/<branch> # this switches the branch to the 'feature/<branch>' if you are not in it, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest git checkout develop # this switches the branch to the develop branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest git merge feature/<branch> # merge feature/branch to develop git push # push changes to git repo in develop branch
    • 创建发布分支
    git flow release start <branch>

    对比

    git checkout develop # this switches the branch to the develop branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest git checkout -b release/<branch> # this creates a branch named 'release/<branch>' git push --set-upstream origin release/<branch> # push changes to git repo to a new 'release/<branch>' and this will trigger the BUILD to QA
     git flow release finish <branch>

    对比

    git checkout release/<branch> # this switches the branch to the 'release/<branch>' if you are not in it, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest git checkout develop # this switches the branch to the develop branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest git merge release/<branch> # merge release/branch to develop git push # push changes to git repo in develop branch git checkout main # this switches the branch to the main branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest git merge release/<branch> # merge release/branch to main git push # push changes to git repo in main branch git push --tags # push tags git push -d origin release/<branch> # delete remote branch
     git flow hotfix start <branch>

    对比

    git checkout main # this switches the branch to the main branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest git checkout -b hotfix/<branch> # this creates a branch named 'hotfix/<branch>' git push --set-upstream origin hotfix/<branch> # push changes to git repo to a new 'hotfix/<branch>' and this will trigger the BUILD to QA
     git flow hotfix finish <branch>

    对比

    git checkout hotfix/<branch> # this switches the branch to the 'hotfix/<branch>' if you are not in it, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest git checkout develop # this switches the branch to the develop branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest git merge hotfix/<branch> # merge hotfix/branch to develop git push # push changes to git repo in develop branch git checkout main # this switches the branch to the main branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest git merge hotfix/<branch> # merge hotfix/branch to main git push # push changes to git repo in main branch


    • 原文:

    Gitflow Workflow is a Git workflow that helps with continuous software development and implementing DevOps practices. It was first published and made popular by Vincent Driessen at nvie. The Gitflow Workflow defines a strict branching model designed around the project release. This provides a robust framework for managing larger projects. This is suited for projects that releases are based on a schedule.

    Gitflow workflow is not for everybody. But for those who loves and using it below are some shortcuts that can help you understand what is this workflow.

    Installing git-flow plugin for git client is plain and simple. For mac-os, easiest to install is brew install git-flow.

    Basic Commands and Configuration

    • git flow init
    • git flow feature start/finish
    • git flow release start/finish
    • git flow hotfix start/finish
    • git merge

    Basic Configuration Flow

    Concurrent Configuration Flow

    The overall flow of Gitflow is:

    1. A develop branch is created from main.
    2. A release branch is created from develop.
    3. Feature branches are created from develop.
    4. When a feature is complete it is merged into the develop branch.
    5. When the release branch is done it is merged into develop and main.
    6. If an issue in main is detected a hotfix branch is created from main.
    7. Once the hotfix is complete it is merged to both develop and main and/or feature branches.

    Git vs Git Flow Commands

    These are base guidelines that corresponds to some of the git commands used by the git-flow wrapper client. These commands are not fixed in stone. Depending on situations, there are steps that can be altered or change within the course of the development.

    Create a develop branch on your local if one doesn’t exists in the repo.

    • Initialisation (specific for git flow only) 
    $ git flow init
Which branch should be used for bringing forth production releases?
   - develop
   - master
Which branch should be used for integration of the "next release"?
   - master
   - develop
Branch name for "next release" development: [develop]

How to name your supporting branch prefixes?
Feature branches? [feature/]
Bugfix branches? [bugfix/]
Release branches? [release/]
Hotfix branches? [hotfix/]
Support branches? [support/]
Version tag prefix? []
Hooks and filters directory? [../../.git/hooks]
    • Creating feature branches 
    git flow feature start <branch>

    vs

    git checkout develop                     # this switches the branch to the develop branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest
git checkout -b feature/<branch>         # this creates a branch named 'feature/<branch>'
git push --set-upstream origin feature/<branch>   # push changes to git repo to a new 'feature/<branch>'

    git flow feature finish <branch>

    vs

    git checkout feature/<branch>            # this switches the branch to the 'feature/<branch>' if you are not in it, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest
git checkout develop                     # this switches the branch to the develop branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest
git merge feature/<branch>               # merge feature/branch to develop
git push                                 # push changes to git repo in develop branch
    • Creating a release branch 
    git flow release start <branch>

    vs

    git checkout develop                     # this switches the branch to the develop branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest
git checkout -b release/<branch>         # this creates a branch named 'release/<branch>'
git push --set-upstream origin release/<branch>   # push changes to git repo to a new 'release/<branch>' and this will trigger the BUILD to QA

    git flow release finish <branch>

    vs

    git checkout release/<branch>            # this switches the branch to the 'release/<branch>' if you are not in it, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest
git checkout develop                     # this switches the branch to the develop branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest
git merge release/<branch>               # merge release/branch to develop
git push                                 # push changes to git repo in develop branch
git checkout main                        # this switches the branch to the main branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest
git merge release/<branch>               # merge release/branch to main
git push                                 # push changes to git repo in main branch
git push --tags                          # push tags
git push -d origin release/<branch>      # delete remote branch

    git flow hotfix start <branch>

    vs

    git checkout main                        # this switches the branch to the main branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest
git checkout -b hotfix/<branch>          # this creates a branch named 'hotfix/<branch>'
git push --set-upstream origin hotfix/<branch>   # push changes to git repo to a new 'hotfix/<branch>' and this will trigger the BUILD to QA

    git flow hotfix finish <branch>

    vs

    git checkout hotfix/<branch>             # this switches the branch to the 'hotfix/<branch>' if you are not in it, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest
git checkout develop                     # this switches the branch to the develop branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest
git merge hotfix/<branch>                # merge hotfix/branch to develop
git push                                 # push changes to git repo in develop branch
git checkout main                        # this switches the branch to the main branch, do a `git pull` to make sure it is latest
git merge hotfix/<branch>                # merge hotfix/branch to main
git push                                 # push changes to git repo in main branch
